description: Scope v6 (26 Apr 2026): email-driven dashboard using Aloha 'ALL METRICS' xlsx as the sole data source. 7 sites only. If any HARD rule fails, the agent must NOT overwrite data/latest.json — it must write data/_latest_rejected.json and send a notification. v6 makes the parser self-adapting: any new revenue-centre label is auto-classified into other_in_store_gbp / other_delivery_gbp and captured on the dashboard, with a soft warning so we know to add a dedicated mapping. The hard rule parser_rc_reconciles_to_xlsx_total still guarantees no revenue is dropped. Marketman is kept as a pending/hidden section until a scheduled email is set up.

hard_rules.rule: Parsed Aloha xlsx must contain all 7 configured sites (match on aloha_report_name). Any missing site is a hard reject.
group_total.net_sales_gbp must equal sum of per-site net_sales_gbp within ±0.05 GBP (rounding tolerance).
group_total.checks must equal sum of per-site checks exactly.
group_total.guests must equal sum of per-site guests exactly.
group_total.delivery_gbp must equal sum of per-site delivery_gbp within ±0.05 GBP.
For each site, sum(revenue_centers.*) must equal net_sales_gbp within ±0.05 GBP.

For each site, sum of recognised revenue centres must reconcile to the xlsx's own TOTAL: line on the 'Sales by Revenue Center' block within ±0.05 GBP. Catches the case where a revenue centre exists in the xlsx but the parser doesn't know about it (e.g. BAR at OPA Bath).
For each site, delivery_gbp + in_store_gbp must equal net_sales_gbp within ±0.05 GBP.
trading_date must equal (today - 1 day, Europe/London). Bypass allowed only if BUILD_ALLOW_ANY_DATE env var is set (for replay/testing).
All net_sales_gbp, checks, guests, avg_check_gbp, delivery_gbp must be >= 0. Individual revenue center values may be 0 but not negative.

soft_rules.rule: For any site expected to trade, net_sales_gbp > 0. Warn if 0.
Per-site avg_check_gbp between 5.00 and 80.00 when checks > 0.
Per-site net_sales_gbp below targets.daily_revenue_per_site_gbp (£1,800) is a soft warning — surfaced as a badge on the dashboard, not a reject.
Per-site delivery_gbp / net_sales_gbp between 0% and 85% (sites with no delivery legitimately sit at 0%). Above 85% is a warn.
Group net sales vs same weekday 7 days ago should not differ by more than ±50%. If history file is missing or empty, skip.

section_status_rules.rule: Marketman section is shown on the dashboard as section_status='pending' with an explanatory note. It becomes 'active' only once a Marketman scheduled email report is set up and parsed. Do not overwrite marketman data once pending.

notify_on.reject: Send a notification titled 'Miaris dashboard NOT refreshed' with the failing rule ids.
notify_on.warn: Proceed. Include warnings in data/latest.json under validation.warnings so the dashboard can badge them.
notify_on.sites_below_target: Always surface in the notification body, but only when the validation itself passed.
